sentences.arabic: افْتَتَحَ السُّوقُ الأُسْبُوعِيُّ أَبْوَابَهُ صَبَاحَ الْيَوْمِ.
sentences.translation: Sedmična pijaca otvorila je svoja vrata jutros.
sentences.translationEn: The weekly market opened its doors this morning.

sentences.arabic: جَاءَ كَثِيرٌ مِنَ الْبَائِعِينَ بِخُضَرَاوَاتٍ طَازَجَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Mnogi prodavači su donijeli svježe povrće.
sentences.translationEn: Many vendors came with fresh vegetables.

sentences.translation: Ljudi su kupovali voće, hljeb i sir.
sentences.translationEn: People bought fruits, bread, and cheese.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ السُّوقُ مُزْدَحِمًا وَصَاخِبًا طُولَ النَّهَارِ.
sentences.translation: Pijaca je bila gužvava i glasna cijeli dan.
sentences.translationEn: The market was crowded and noisy all day long.
